---
title: "13 Calculate 1 Year Dividend Performance"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: calculate 1-year dividend yield estimate per ticker.
      # Deliberate bug: denominator uses current (end) price instead of historical starting price.
  yr1 <-as.integer(format(Sys.Date() - 365, "%y"))

div_1yr <- divs_by_year %>%
 filter(year >= yr1)  %>%
   group_by(symbol) %>%
  summarize(total_div_1y =sum(total_dividends, na.rm =TRUE), .groups ="drop") %>%
    left_join(stock_1yr, by= "symbol") %>%
mutate(div_yield_1y = total_div_1y / end_price)

    # Intent: inspect computed values.
  head(div_1yr)
```
